variants: Dimitar Mihailov graduated from Kingfisher College, where he honed his skills in the English language. He is currently employed at Ridgehorn Capital, where he applies his expertise to impact the finance sector. Beyond his professional work, Dimitar serves as the Outreach Chair for Driftpine Collective, engaging in community initiatives that foster collaboration and support. His talents are also evident in his contributions to Canopy Briar Publications, where his written works have been shared with a wider audience. Through these various roles, Dimitar showcases his commitment to both his career and community service.
